item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 6h GM Brett Veach believes Alohi Gilman can be similar to Tyrann Mathieu, Justin Reid for
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 6h GM Brett Veach believes Alohi Gilman can be similar to Tyrann Mathieu, Justin Reid for Chiefs: "When you had success -- you had a guy like the Badger and you had a guy like Justin Reid back there -- Alohi fits that bill"
https:// nfl.com/news/chiefs-gm -brett-veach-alohi-gilman-fits-that-mold-of-safeties-tyrann-mathieu-justin-reid?campaign=Twitter_atn … 2 2 13 12 mil

item.title: MoveTheSticks: Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 8h I was on the phone with a GM less than an hour ago running thr
item.description: Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 8h I was on the phone with a GM less than an hour ago running through top 10 scenarios. The way we had it going, we both said, “the bengals are screwed.” Well, not anymore. This trade makes a ton of sense for them. 140 583 6 mil 863 mil

item.title:
AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 6h New York’s NFL teams now control 25% of the top 16 picks in Thursday night’s draft.
Th
item.description:
Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 6h New York’s NFL teams now control 25% of the top 16 picks in Thursday night’s draft.
The Giants are slated to pick 5th and 10th, the Jets 2nd and 16th. 146 173 2 mil 286 mil

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 7h The #Bengals are expected to hammer out a significant long-term deal with DT Dexter
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 7h The #Bengals are expected to hammer out a significant long-term deal with DT Dexter Lawrence as part of the trade, once he passes his physical, per sources.
A very un-Bengals move … but this is a changing organization. And their actions confirm it. 68 419 2 mil 157 mil

item.title: AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7h This is the first time a player has been traded without any additional compensation for
item.description: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7h This is the first time a player has been traded without any additional compensation for a haul that included a Top-10 pick in that year's draft since the Vikings traded Randy Moss to the Raiders in 2005 in exchange for a haul that included the 7th overall pick that year, per ESPN Mostrar más Cita Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7h A Bengals trade for Dexter Lawrence is unprecedented: This is the first time in the common draft era that dates back to 1966 in which the Bengals ever have traded a Top-10 pick for a player, per ESPN research. 135 198 2 mil 1 M
